description: Developing and maintaining client-focused applications and web services across multiple domains. Primary owner of backend architecture for e-commerce, logistics, and admin systems. Working with PHP (Slim API), Python (FastAPI/Django), and Node.js.

Maintained internal banking applications, implementing new features and resolving critical bugs. Specialized in TypeScript/JavaScript and FreeMarker Template Language within Bitbucket and Openshift environments.

Completed an intensive full-stack development program. Focused on modern web technologies including JavaScript, React, PHP, and database design. Developed multiple end-to-end applications and refined coding best practices.
Managed procurement processes and logistics operations. Coordinated between department teams to streamline purchasing workflows and ensure operational efficiency.
Led client support initiatives and project management. Focused on direct coaching, training programs, and delivering structured marketing solutions for diverse clients.
